info.title: Line Items
info.x-hubspot-api-use-case: When creating a set of quotes for sales reps to send to potential buyers, use this API to add goods and services to the quotes.
info.x-hubspot-introduction: Use the line items API to add instances of products to deals and quotes. You can create line items from existing products or create them as custom line items with no product attached.

post.summary: Read line items by ID or property

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Whether to return only results that have been archived

post.description: Returns a batch of line items matching the provided internal IDs or unique property values, with partial success indicated by a 207 response.

get.summary: Retrieve a line item by ID
get.description: Read an Object identified by `{lineItemId}`. `{lineItemId}` refers to the internal object ID by default, or optionally any unique property value as specified by the `idProperty` query param.  Control what is returned via the `properties` query param.

parameters.name: lineItemId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the line item to retrieve.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: A comma separated list of the properties to be returned in the response. If any of the specified properties are not present on the requested object(s), they will be ignored

parameters.name: propertiesWithHistory
parameters.description: A comma separated list of the properties to be returned along with their history of previous values. If any of the specified properties are not present on the requested object(s), they will be ignored

parameters.name: associations
parameters.description: A comma separated list of object types to retrieve associated IDs for. If any of the specified associations do not exist, they will be ignored

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Whether to return only results that have been archived

parameters.name: idProperty
parameters.description: The name of a property whose values are unique for this object type

delete.summary: Archive a line item by ID
delete.description: Move an Object identified by `{lineItemId}` to the recycling bin.

parameters.name: lineItemId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the line item to archive.

patch.summary: Update a line item by ID
patch.description: Perform a partial update of an Object identified by `{lineItemId}`. `{lineItemId}` refers to the internal object ID by default, or optionally any unique property value as specified by the `idProperty` query param. Provided property values will be overwritten. Read-only and non-existent properties will be ignored. Properties values can be cleared by passing an empty string.

parameters.name: lineItemId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the line item to update.

parameters.name: idProperty
parameters.description: The name of a property whose values are unique for this object type

post.summary: Archive a batch of line items by ID
post.description: Archives the specified batch of line items by ID, returning no content on success.

post.summary: Create a batch of line items
post.description: Returns a batch of newly created line item objects, including their IDs and properties. Returns 207 for partial success.

post.summary: Update line items by ID or property
post.description: Returns the updated batch of line item objects identified by internal ID or unique property values. Returns 207 for partial success.

get.summary: List a page of line items
get.description: Read a page of line items. Control what is returned via the `properties` query param.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to display per page

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The paging cursor token of the last successfully read resource will be returned as the `paging.next.after` JSON property of a paged response containing more results

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: A comma separated list of the properties to be returned in the response. If any of the specified properties are not present on the requested object(s), they will be ignored

parameters.name: propertiesWithHistory
parameters.description: A comma separated list of the properties to be returned along with their history of previous values. If any of the specified properties are not present on the requested object(s), they will be ignored. Usage of this parameter will reduce the maximum number of objects that can be read by a single request

parameters.name: associations
parameters.description: A comma separated list of object types to retrieve associated IDs for. If any of the specified associations do not exist, they will be ignored

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Whether to return only results that have been archived

post.description: Create a line item with the given properties and return a copy of the object, including the ID. Documentation and examples for creating standard line items is provided.
Create or update records identified by a unique property value as specified by the `idProperty` query param. `idProperty` query param refers to a property whose values are unique for the object.
Returns a paginated list of line items matching the specified search criteria and filters.
